title: Report of the Independent Reviewer of State Threats Legislation
body: "This is the report of the independent reviewer of terrorism legislation on the operation of parts 1 and 2 of the National Security Act 2023 and Schedule 3 to the Counter-Terrorism and Border Security Act 2019.  The Security Minister, Dan Jarvis MBE MP, has written to the independent reviewer with the government’s response.   We are aware that this publication may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing it so that we can fix these.  Read more about our accessible documents policy.   "
